transcription.text: You finally fell in love. Uh-huh. With my new Hoover vacuum cleaner. Say, is that the new Hoover portable? Sure is. And I love it. Everything I need is right here under the lid. That's good. There's lots more. Look how easily it follows me wherever I go. And talk about power. I found out my new Hoover has extra cleaning power. Extra cleaning power to handle any cleaning job. There. Everything back in place. And it's so compact, I can even keep it in my little linen closet. No wonder you're in love with your Hoover portable. There's one more reason. What's that? My husband gave it to me. I love my new Hoover portable vacuum cleaner.
